name: allowed-locations-contoso
displayName: [Contoso] Allowed locations — West Europe and North Europe only
description: Restricts resource deployment to approved Azure regions. Contoso Manufacturing only uses West Europe (Amsterdam) and North Europe (Dublin) for GDPR data residency compliance. Resources deployed outside the approved regions are denied.

metadata.author: Bjorn Pacquet
metadata.businessJustification: Ensure all workloads remain within approved EU datacenter regions.

metadata.description: Azure regions approved by Contoso Manufacturing.
Enable audit mode during rollout before enforcing deny.
